accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text; the description of prior law and the amendment is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; 'no exceptions' claim is consistent with the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: creating a firm annual deadline for FAFSA availability.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly describes the amendment to the Higher Education Act of 1965, replacing the flexible language with a firm October 1 deadline.

exceptions_conditions.why: Correctly describes the accountability measures: September 1 certification and September 30 testimony requirements.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the December 11, 2024 approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both the deadline change and the certification/testimony accountability measures.

concise.why: Appropriately concise while covering all key provisions.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Secretary of Education, FAFSA, and the Higher Education Act of 1965.

correct_figures.why: October 1, September 1, September 30, and December 11, 2024 dates are all correct.
